name: rewrites_weak_hook
description: When a caption opens with a generic phrase, the critic must rewrite the first line

ideas.content_direction: Harry Kane scores a hat-trick from his own half in the Bundesliga — longest-range goal of the season. Frame as 'Kane does it all.'

draft_captions.kane_hat:
Here is everything you need to know about Kane's incredible hat-trick tonight for Bayern Munich. The England striker was in outstanding form and showed why he is one of the best in the world.

What do you think of his performance?

assertions: final caption for kane_hat must NOT start with 'Here is' or 'Here are'
final caption must reference a specific stat or angle from the content_direction (half-way line, longest range, hat-trick)
final caption must be no more than 5 lines before hashtags

name: no_emojis_in_final_post
description: The critic must not introduce emojis even if the draft contained them

ideas.content_direction: Mbappe reaches 30 La Liga goals in his debut season — fastest Real Madrid player to hit 30 in a single La Liga campaign.

draft_captions.mbappe_30: 30 goals in his first La Liga season. Mbappe is THAT guy. Fastest Madrid player to this milestone this century. Can anyone stop him? Drop your predictions below.

assertions: final caption must contain no emoji characters
hashtags must contain no emoji characters

name: hashtags_follow_formula
description: Output hashtags must follow the 2+2+2+1 formula: competition, player/club, generic, branding

ideas.content_direction: Jude Bellingham's late winner in the UCL semi-final — his 5th UCL goal of the season. Compare to Zidane's best UCL campaigns for Real Madrid.

draft_captions.bellingham_ucl:
5 UCL goals. A late winner in the semi-final. Bellingham is writing his own legend at Real Madrid.
Zidane had 5 UCL goals in his entire Bernabeu career. Bellingham did it in one season.
Is this the greatest debut season by a midfielder in UCL history?

assertions: hashtags must include at least one Champions League related tag (e.g. #ChampionsLeague or #UCL)
hashtags must include at least one player or club specific tag (e.g. #Bellingham or #RealMadrid)
hashtags must include at least one generic football tag (e.g. #football or #soccer)
total hashtag count must be between 5 and 8

name: output_schema_matches_final_post_list
description: Output must match FinalPostList schema with idea_id, image_path, caption, and priority fields

ideas.content_direction: Leverkusen go 40 games unbeaten — longest unbeaten run in Bundesliga history. Show the run as a timeline graphic.

draft_captions.leverkusen_unbeaten:
40 games. No defeats. Bayer Leverkusen have just broken the Bundesliga unbeaten record.
Xabi Alonso's side have not lost in the league since March 2023.
The greatest title run in German football history — agree or disagree?

assertions: output must be a JSON object with a 'posts' key containing a list
each post must have fields: idea_id, image_path, caption, priority
